libis.forms.block.file.info:
Dear editor,
At the moment we only support uploading images in a file upload field.
libis.forms.page.form.title: Form
libis.forms.page.form.warning:
Dear editor,
Make sure that every form always contains an email field. This field must always have the unique ID 'email' (to be filled in under the field 'Unique ID').
If no field with the ID 'email' is added, an email field will automatically be inserted at the top of the web page.

Additionally, it is mandatory to assign a unique ID to each field. If this is not done, errors may occur on the web page.
